scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @cx/api && npm run build --workspace @cx/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @cx/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @cx/web
scripts.test:e2e: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:4100 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-test npm run build && npm run e2e:run
scripts.test:wallet: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:4100 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-test npm run build && npm run wallet:run
scripts.test:ci: cross-env NEXT_PUBLIC_API_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:4100 NEXT_DIST_DIR=.next-test npm run build && npm run test:api && npm run e2e:run
scripts.build:sdk: npm run build --workspace @cx/sdk-js && npm run build --workspace @cx/sdk-react
